<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\BloomFilter; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/bf.add/ * * Creates an empty Bloom Filter with a single sub-filter for the * initial capacity requested and with an upper bound error_rate. */ class BFADD extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'BF.ADD'; } }
